response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the first song as 'We are GAMERS!!!!' by 'hololiveGAMERS' via on-screen text 'We are GAMERS!!!!' and search.
2. Identified the second song as 'Kirameki Rider' by 'hololive IDOL PROJECT' via on-screen text 'キラメキライダー☆' and search.
3. Searched for lyrics using '[Song Title] [Artist] Japanese and English lyrics' template.
4. Mapped scenes based on the song change at 02:20.
5. Searched 'We are GAMERS!!!! hololiveGAMERS Japanese and English lyrics' and 'Kirameki Rider Hololive IDOL PROJECT Japanese and English lyrics'.
response.global_summary: A two-song performance featuring various Hololive talents. The first song is "We are GAMERS!!!!" performed by the group hololiveGAMERS (Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Inugami Korone). The second song is "Kirameki Rider" (キラメキライダー☆) performed by Nakiri Ayame, Oozora Subaru, Yuzuki Choco, and other members of the Hololive IDOL PROJECT.

scenes.description: The performance begins with the group hololiveGAMERS (Fubuki, Mio, Okayu, Korone) singing "We are GAMERS!!!!" on a brightly lit stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
(G-A-M-E-R-S) We are gamers (G-A-M-E-R-S) We are gamers
(フブキ) 狐らしく現る狐　艶やかな白い髪とケモ耳
(ミオ) 守護る狼　絆を探して
(おかゆ) 気まぐれ猫　一言でハートを盗む
(ころね) 尻尾振る犬　どこまでも追いかけるよ
4人で　We are the GAMERS ultimate
ジョインして　Bダッシュで
レベルアップして　クリア目指そう
何プレイしようか？
君のハートの数式も回収
エインも　シミュレーションも
初見さんも　常連さんも　みんなでゲーム...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(G-A-M-E-R-S) We are gamers (G-A-M-E-R-S) We are gamers
Appearing foxily is the fox, with shiny white hair and furry ears
(Mio) I'm the Wolf who protects, searching for our bonds
(Okayu) A mysterious cat with a casual look, stealing hearts with just one word
(Korone) A dog with a tail wagging non-stop, chasing after you whenever I can
Together, the four of us are the GAMERS ultimate
Join us and hit the B dash
Up our levels aiming to clear
What will we play today?
Solving the equation to your heart as well
We make the choices, run the simulation
First-timers, old-timers, let’s all play games...

scenes.description: The second song "Kirameki Rider" begins with various Hololive talents (Nakiri Ayame, Oozora Subaru, Yuzuki Choco) on stage. On-screen text indicates the song title.
scenes.song_title: Kirameki Rider (キラメキライダー☆)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
生まれたてのドキドキを 響かせよう
最高の時間 最高の仲間と キラメキに乗って
(イェーイ!) 覚えてるかな? 最初の歌 (懐かしいね)
私 声が震えていた (ほんの少し)
あの日から 終わらないメロディー
キラメキライダー☆ 響かせよう
最高の時間 最高の仲間と...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Let's make the heart-pounding of our birth resound
The best time, with the best companions, riding on the sparkle
(Yeah!) Do you remember? Our very first song (it's nostalgic)
My voice was trembling (just a little bit)
From that day on, the melody that never ends
Kirameki Rider! Let's make it shine!
The best time, with the best companions...
